title: 3D Buckets - From A Minecraft Movie
description: A 3D model of a bucket, inspired by A Minecraft Movie, with its variants like lava bucket, milk, powder snow, fish etc.
body:
A 3D bucket (with its variants) inspired by A Minecraft Movie!
